testcase.name: test_employee_verify_writes_hashes_no_plaintext

failure.message: AssertionError: raw.email leaked into storage assert 'email' not in {'assigned_shift': '8:30 to 5:30', 'assigned_weekly_off': 'Saturday_Sunday (All Saturday, All Sunday)', 'band': 'N.A.', 'bu_cost_center_id': 'Capital Markets & Advisory 001', ...}

testcase.failure: tests/test_phase7_lifecycle.py:135: in test_employee_verify_writes_hashes_no_plaintext assert "email" not in raw, "raw.email leaked into storage" E AssertionError: raw.email leaked into storage E assert 'email' not in {'assigned_shift': '8:30 to 5:30', 'assigned_weekly_off': 'Saturday_Sunday (All Saturday, All Sunday)', 'band': 'N.A.', 'bu_cost_center_id': 'Capital Markets & Advisory 001', ...}

testcase.name: test_reporting_chain

failure.message: assert 'directory_my_reporting_chain' in ['directory_field_value'] + where ['directory_field_value'] = _trace_tools({'blocks': [{'text': "No employee matched 'user's own name'.", 'type': 'text'}], 'citations': [], 'intent': 'DIRECTORY_QUERY', 'model': None, ...})

testcase.failure: tests/test_phase8_directory.py:176: in test_reporting_chain assert "directory_my_reporting_chain" in _trace_tools(j) E assert 'directory_my_reporting_chain' in ['directory_field_value'] E + where ['directory_field_value'] = _trace_tools({'blocks': [{'text': "No employee matched 'user's own name'.", 'type': 'text'}], 'citations': [], 'intent': 'DIRECTORY_QUERY', 'model': None, ...})
